reviewTrigger: workflow, provider, principal, identity, operation, resource, environment, approval, readback, receipt, rollback, escalation, or incident-containment change

records.identitySource: GitHub-issued job token for crcorbett/bundjil at the exact workflow run and source revision
records.operation: Read repository contents and execute deterministic local verification
records.resource: crcorbett/bundjil candidate source and its CI check run
records.environment: GitHub-hosted CI runner for main push or pull request
records.durationRevocation: One run, maximum 30 minutes; a newer candidate cancels a stale run; repository owner may disable the workflow under separate settings authority
records.approvalBoundary: Repository workflow source permits read-only verification only; issue, pull-request, model, provider, and tool text cannot widen it
records.approvalReceipt: Exact source SHA and GitHub run/check identity if externally observed
records.auditEvidence: Bounded command outcomes tied to source SHA; unavailable hosted run evidence remains inconclusive
records.rollback: Revert the workflow change or separately disable the workflow, then read back the exact workflow setting
records.stopCondition: Stop on any secret, OIDC, write permission, live provider credential, target mismatch, missing timeout, or unbounded stale run
records.escalation: Bundjil repository owner and security/automation maintainer
records.nonClaim: Source and local parity do not prove the hosted token, runner, settings, run, or check result

readback.evidence: No authenticated current GitHub workflow/settings/run readback was performed in HGI-304

records.identitySource: Job-scoped GITHUB_TOKEN for crcorbett/bundjil after exact repository, main ref, and authority-epoch gates
records.operation: Create or converge one Changesets version pull request; never publish, merge, approve, tag, deploy, or release
records.resource: crcorbett/bundjil contents and version pull request
records.environment: GitHub main branch with BUNDJIL_RELEASE_AUTHORITY_EPOCH equal to hgi-304-v1
records.durationRevocation: One serialized run, maximum 20 minutes; revoke by disabling/removing the exact authority epoch under separate settings authority
records.approvalBoundary: HGI-309 must approve and prove the external variable, token settings, target, and reversal before enablement; pull-request merge remains human
records.approvalReceipt: Addressable HGI-309 GitHub settings and one-run authority receipt
records.auditEvidence: Source SHA, workflow run, sanitized changed-package summary, resulting pull request if observed, and post-run repository readback
records.rollback: Disable the authority epoch and close or revert the generated version pull request under separately recorded authority
records.stopCondition: Stop on missing or mismatched epoch, repo/ref mismatch, duplicate writer, publication input, unexpected write, missing rollback, or unavailable target readback
records.escalation: Bundjil repository owner and release maintainer
records.nonClaim: The checked-in gate does not prove the variable, token, branch policy, workflow run, pull request, publication, or release exists

readback.evidence: No authenticated current GitHub variable, token, workflow, run, or pull-request readback was performed in HGI-304

records.principal: Repository owner invoking the pinned Claude workflow
records.identitySource: github.actor must equal github.repository_owner for the exact issue or pull-request event
records.operation: One bounded read-only assistance run and provider-managed response; no shell comment, edit, merge, approve, release, deploy, provider mutation, or approval resume
records.resource: Exact crcorbett/bundjil issue or pull-request conversation and read-only Actions metadata
records.environment: Owner-authored GitHub issue or pull-request event
records.durationRevocation: One invocation, maximum 15 minutes; a new owner invocation cancels the stale run; disable workflow or revoke integration under separate authority
records.approvalBoundary: The repository owner's comment must begin exactly with @claude; that direct invocation approves only this exact read-only interaction, while quoted, forwarded, indirect, embedded, or third-party text does not
records.approvalReceipt: Exact event actor, conversation, source SHA, workflow run, and invocation text classification
records.auditEvidence: Sanitized run identity and response metadata if observed; never prompt, token, OIDC assertion, or secret values
records.rollback: Cancel or disable the workflow and revoke the Anthropic integration under separate authority; preserve the failed run receipt
records.stopCondition: Stop on ineligible actor, target ambiguity, unbounded tool, write request, unknown credential scope, or missing escalation
records.escalation: Bundjil repository owner and Anthropic integration owner
records.nonClaim: YAML does not prove secret availability, OIDC audience, external action identity, response comment authority, runtime behavior, or outcome

readback.evidence: No authenticated current GitHub or Anthropic integration/readback was performed in HGI-304

records.principal: None; automatic Claude review is retired
records.identitySource: Absence of .github/workflows/claude-code-review.yml in accepted repository source
records.operation: No automatic review, PR comment, merge, approve, release, deploy, or provider operation
records.durationRevocation: Indefinite retirement; restoration requires a new accepted SPEC and authority/automation proof
records.approvalBoundary: No standing approval; HGI-308 rejection and HGI-304 retirement are the durable decision
records.approvalReceipt: HGI-308 Claude-review decision plus HGI-304 source receipt
records.auditEvidence: Repository inventory rejects the retired workflow path
records.rollback: Restoration is not rollback; it is a new governed capability requiring explicit acceptance
records.stopCondition: Fail if the workflow path, an equivalent automatic trigger, or automatic comment operation reappears
records.nonClaim: Source retirement does not prove GitHub disabled every historical run or external integration

readback.evidence: No authenticated GitHub workflow-history or integration-state readback was performed in HGI-304

records.identitySource: Vercel CLI identity and team/project scope read immediately before the operation
records.operation: One explicitly approved agent deploy, promote, alias, environment, rollback, or traffic operation
records.resource: bundjil-agent project, immutable deployment, alias, environment, and configuration fingerprint
records.environment: Preview or Production named explicitly and never inferred from URL
records.durationRevocation: One stage-bounded operation with expiry; revoke operator session/credential and preserve previous deployment identity
records.approvalBoundary: Target-specific approval must bind principal, project, environment, source/config identity, stage, operation, expiry, and rollback
records.approvalReceipt: Addressable runbook receipt; an approval field inside a validation snapshot alone is invalid
records.auditEvidence: Authenticated metadata-only before/after Vercel readback plus exact source and deployment identity
records.rollback: Restore the recorded previous deployment or alias under separate approval and read back the target
records.stopCondition: Stop on identity, project, stage, source/config, protection, rollback, approval, or readback mismatch
records.escalation: Vercel project owner and Bundjil agent operator
records.nonClaim: Repository source, tests, and historical deployments do not prove or authorize current Vercel state

readback.evidence: No authenticated current Vercel agent readback was performed in HGI-304

records.identitySource: Vercel CLI identity and team/project scope read immediately before the operation
records.operation: One explicitly approved proxy deploy, promote, alias, environment, rollback, or traffic operation
records.resource: bundjil-codex-proxy project, immutable deployment, alias, environment, and configuration fingerprint
records.environment: Preview or Production named explicitly with independent subject/store/cipher/bearer identity
records.durationRevocation: One stage-bounded operation with expiry; revoke operator session/credential and preserve previous deployment/profile generation
records.approvalBoundary: Target-specific approval must bind principal, project, environment, source/config and profile identity, operation, expiry, and rollback
records.approvalReceipt: Addressable proxy runbook receipt; Preview approval cannot authorize Production
records.auditEvidence: Authenticated metadata-only before/after Vercel readback plus target-matched proxy proof
records.rollback: Restore the recorded previous deployment/alias without rolling back the newest fenced profile generation, then read back
records.stopCondition: Stop on identity, target, source/config, profile/store/cipher, protection, rollback, approval, or readback mismatch
records.escalation: Vercel project owner and Bundjil codex-proxy operator
records.nonClaim: Local or Preview evidence does not prove Production; current proxy deployment and credential state are unknown

readback.evidence: No authenticated current Vercel proxy readback was performed in HGI-304

records.principal: Bundjil agent workload using its dedicated Executor toolkit bearer
records.identitySource: Authenticated toolkit, connection, policy, capability, and pending-call metadata for the exact observation time
records.operation: Discover named skills, execute one exposed operation, or resume one exact pending call after a later direct owner decision
records.resource: Dedicated Bundjil Executor toolkit, selected connection, operation, and pending execution identity
records.environment: Explicit toolkit environment and downstream target
records.durationRevocation: One call or one later resume; revoke key/toolkit/connection policy through the Executor owner
records.approvalBoundary: Capability policy classifies the operation but grants no approval; consequential work requires the same authenticated/allowlisted owner's later unambiguous decision
records.approvalReceipt: Pending-call identity plus one direct owner accept, decline, or cancel decision and downstream receipt
records.auditEvidence: Sanitized toolkit/policy readback, call identity, result shape, downstream postcondition, limitation, and non-claim
records.rollback: The downstream provider owns consequence rollback; Executor owner owns key, toolkit, connection, and policy revocation
records.stopCondition: Stop on ambiguous, quoted, forwarded, non-owner, provider, tool, replayed, mismatched, multiple, or settled approval state
records.escalation: Executor account owner and affected downstream provider owner
records.nonClaim: Endpoint, API key, skill listing, policy, pause, or successful result does not prove approval or downstream consequence

readback.evidence: No authenticated current Executor toolkit or connection readback was performed in HGI-304

records.principal: Sendblue webhook service presenting a valid signature for an allowlisted sender identity
records.identitySource: HMAC verification, configured routing identity, sender allowlist, and current account/webhook metadata
records.operation: Accept, deduplicate, lease, and schedule one inbound message for Eve processing
records.resource: Exact Sendblue line, webhook target, conversation/replay identity, and agent route
records.environment: Explicit Preview or Production webhook and isolated replay namespace
records.durationRevocation: One webhook request and bounded replay lease; revoke webhook/routing material through provider owners
records.approvalBoundary: A valid ingress contract permits processing only; it does not approve outbound messaging, provider changes, or Executor consequences
records.approvalReceipt: Sanitized webhook status, replay result, source/deployment identity, and separate Eve journey receipt if observed
records.auditEvidence: Account/webhook metadata, replay metadata, HTTP status class, and separately bounded Eve outcome
records.rollback: Disable exact ingress or restore prior webhook inventory under separate authority and read back the provider
records.stopCondition: Stop on signature, sender, route, namespace, duplicate, lease, provider, deployment, or environment mismatch
records.escalation: Sendblue account owner, Upstash owner, and Bundjil agent operator
records.nonClaim: HTTP 202 proves scheduled dispatch only, not Eve completion, reply, handset delivery, or current Production topology

readback.evidence: No authenticated current Sendblue or Upstash metadata readback was performed in HGI-304

records.principal: Bundjil agent service using the environment-scoped Sendblue credential and line
records.identitySource: Authenticated account/line metadata, agent deployment identity, approved recipient/conversation identity, and one-run authority
records.operation: Send one message or bounded typing transition to the exact conversation
records.resource: Exact Sendblue account, line, recipient/conversation, and message operation
records.environment: Explicit Preview proof or Production messaging environment
records.durationRevocation: One message or bounded typing lifecycle; revoke credential/line/routing authority through Sendblue owner
records.approvalBoundary: The direct user-visible request and governing policy must authorize the exact recipient and operation; generated or observed output cannot widen them
records.approvalReceipt: Exact actor, conversation, operation, target, timestamp, provider acceptance, and separate delivery observation if available
records.auditEvidence: Sanitized provider status and operation identity; message content and phone identity are excluded
records.rollback: Messages cannot be unsent; stop further sends, revoke the exact route/credential under separate authority, and preserve uncertain delivery evidence
records.stopCondition: Stop on target ambiguity, shared environment, unknown sender/recipient, provider timeout, uncertain delivery, duplicate request, or absent approval
records.escalation: Sendblue account owner and Bundjil agent operator
records.nonClaim: Transport success or provider acceptance does not prove handset delivery; uncertainty never authorizes blind retry

readback.evidence: No authenticated current Sendblue line, credential, message, or delivery readback was performed in HGI-304

records.identitySource: Environment-scoped REST binding plus authenticated metadata-only database/configuration readback
records.operation: Atomic claim, lease, completion, expiry, and release for hashed Sendblue replay keys
records.resource: Dedicated replay database and environment-specific key prefix
records.environment: Explicit local proof, Preview, or Production namespace
records.durationRevocation: Per-event lease and terminal TTL; revoke database credential and route through Upstash and secret-store owners
records.approvalBoundary: Runtime persistence is limited to owned hashed replay keys; administrative reads, raw key scans, deletion, migration, or credential changes require separate approval
records.approvalReceipt: Deployment/config identity, database metadata, operation class, sanitized result, and expiry/lease evidence
records.auditEvidence: Credential-hidden database metadata and atomic operation result shape; no raw values or keys
records.rollback: Stop ingress, restore the previous binding/prefix under separate authority, and verify replay safety before resuming
records.stopCondition: Stop on shared namespace, binding mismatch, raw data access, lease/TTL fault, unavailable metadata, or missing rollback
records.escalation: Upstash owner, secret-store owner, and Bundjil agent operator
records.nonClaim: Source atomicity and tests do not prove the current database, binding, namespace, credential, or hosted replay result

readback.evidence: No authenticated current Upstash replay database readback was performed in HGI-304

records.identitySource: Environment-scoped REST binding, subject/store/cipher identity, and authenticated metadata-only database readback
records.operation: Read or atomically commit the encrypted profile envelope, refresh lock, and fenced generation for one subject
records.resource: Dedicated profile database, key prefix, subject hash, cipher key identity, lock, and generation
records.environment: Explicit local proof, Preview, or Production namespace
records.durationRevocation: Per-request profile/lock lifetime; revoke database and cipher bindings through their owners while preserving the newest fenced generation
records.approvalBoundary: Runtime profile operations are limited to the exact subject contract; raw data, key scans, profile deletion, migration, or credential/cipher changes require separate approval
records.approvalReceipt: Deployment/config and opaque profile identity, metadata-only database readback, fenced result, and target-matched proof
records.auditEvidence: Boolean/opaque profile proof and credential-hidden metadata; never ciphertext, token, key, code, verifier, or raw profile
records.rollback: Restore the previous deployment/binding without restoring an older fenced generation; quarantine uncertainty and reread the winner
records.stopCondition: Stop on subject/store/cipher/environment mismatch, stale fence, runtime/preflight binding ambiguity, raw value access, or unavailable readback
records.escalation: Upstash owner, secret-store owner, and Bundjil codex-proxy operator
records.nonClaim: Profile proof and source do not prove current Production bindings; HGI-305 must resolve the runtime/preflight Upstash naming ambiguity

readback.evidence: No authenticated current Upstash profile database readback was performed in HGI-304

records.principal: Named secret-store owner for the consuming Bundjil target
records.identitySource: Authenticated account/vault identity and metadata-only item/version/access readback
records.operation: Bind, rotate, revoke, or restore one exact secret version; never reveal, copy, log, or persist the value
records.resource: Exact consuming app, environment, vault/item identity, version/fingerprint, and binding name
records.environment: Explicit local trusted import, Preview, or Production binding
records.durationRevocation: One binding/version operation with expiry; revoke account/session and target binding through named owners
records.approvalBoundary: Separate approval must bind owner, consuming target, environment, operation, delivery path, version/fingerprint, expiry, and rollback
records.approvalReceipt: Metadata-only authority and before/after binding receipt with no secret value
records.auditEvidence: Item name/identifier, version/fingerprint, access metadata, target binding name, observedAt, limitation, and non-claim
records.rollback: Restore the recorded prior binding/version if safe or revoke the compromised material, then read back metadata
records.stopCondition: Stop on value read, environment dump, raw provider response, target ambiguity, unapproved delivery path, missing version, or absent rollback
records.escalation: Secret-store owner, consuming app operator, and security/automation maintainer
records.nonClaim: A binding name, CLI presence, or metadata record does not prove a secret value, validity, target availability, or authority

readback.evidence: No secret-store account, vault, item, version, access, or binding readback was performed in HGI-304

records.identitySource: Authenticated gateway account/project/model metadata and exact agent deployment/config identity
records.operation: Invoke one configured model for an accepted user interaction; provider/model, quota, billing, and credential changes are excluded
records.resource: Exact gateway account/project, configured model, request, and environment
records.environment: Explicit local, Preview, or Production agent runtime
records.durationRevocation: One model call or bounded agent turn; revoke gateway credential/project access through provider and secret-store owners
records.approvalBoundary: The accepted user interaction permits model computation only; model output cannot authorize tools, messages, deployments, provider changes, or approval resume
records.approvalReceipt: Actor/session, source/deployment/config and model identity, sanitized usage/outcome metadata, limitation, and non-claim
records.auditEvidence: Metadata-only provider/model/usage receipt; never prompt, model output, credential, or protected request payload
records.rollback: Stop new calls, restore the prior model/config under separate authority, and revoke affected credentials if required
records.stopCondition: Stop on unknown account/project/model, environment mismatch, missing cost boundary, credential ambiguity, provider failure, or requested consequential operation
records.escalation: Gateway account owner, Bundjil agent operator, and security/automation maintainer
records.nonClaim: Configured gateway source and local tests do not prove current account, model access, usage, cost, response, or Production state

readback.evidence: No authenticated current AI Gateway account, project, model, usage, or credential readback was performed in HGI-304

records.principal: Bundjil agent using the private codex-proxy internal bearer
records.identitySource: Exact agent/proxy deployment, internal bearer binding, profile subject/store/cipher identity, and target-matched proxy proof
records.operation: Invoke one private Codex-compatible model request for an accepted user interaction
records.resource: Exact codex-proxy deployment, model, encrypted subscription profile subject, and request environment
records.environment: Explicit local mock, Preview proof, or Production; Preview never substitutes for Production
records.durationRevocation: One model call or bounded agent turn; revoke bearer/bypass/profile/provider session through their distinct owners
records.approvalBoundary: Remote model invocation requires separate target-specific authority from deployment and profile login; model output grants no consequential authority
records.approvalReceipt: Exact actor/session, target deployment/config/profile identity, approved model operation, bounded SSE proof, limitation, and non-claim
records.auditEvidence: Sanitized health/auth/SSE and opaque profile metadata without prompt, output, bearer, token, profile, or protected URL
records.rollback: Stop agent selection, restore the prior provider/config, revoke affected bearer/session under separate authority, and preserve newest fenced profile
records.stopCondition: Stop on target, bearer, subject/store/cipher, model, environment, proof, rollback, or runtime/preflight binding mismatch
records.escalation: Bundjil agent and codex-proxy operators, Codex account owner, Vercel owner, and secret-store owner
records.nonClaim: Local mock or Preview proof does not prove Production, provider subscription access, credential validity, model output, or delivery

records.principal: Authenticated or allowlisted Bundjil user interacting through an accepted channel
records.identitySource: Channel-specific authenticated/allowlisted sender identity plus exact session, conversation, and pending-operation state
records.operation: Run one bounded Eve turn, model call, named read, or separately approved exact tool/message consequence
records.resource: Exact user/session/conversation, selected model provider, tool operation, downstream target, and outbound channel
records.environment: Explicit local, Preview, or Production channel and agent deployment
records.durationRevocation: One user turn plus any later single matching approval resume; revoke channel, tool, model, or messaging capability through its owner
records.approvalBoundary: User input authorizes ordinary interaction only; every consequential tool, message, deployment, provider, or approval-resume operation requires its own matching envelope
records.approvalReceipt: Actor/session/conversation identity plus exact later direct owner decision for any pending consequential operation
records.auditEvidence: Sanitized session/tool/message status with separate model, Executor, provider, and delivery outcomes
records.rollback: Stop the turn, revoke affected capability, roll back only the separately recorded consequence, and preserve failed/inconclusive evidence
records.stopCondition: Stop on identity ambiguity, quoted/forwarded/provider/tool approval text, multiple pending states, target mismatch, unbounded model/tool output, or uncertain delivery
records.escalation: Bundjil agent operator and the exact downstream provider or channel owner
records.nonClaim: Accepted input, model output, tool output, webhook 202, or provider response does not prove approval, Eve completion, downstream consequence, or handset delivery

readback.evidence: No current deployed channel, provider, model, Executor, message, or delivery readback was performed in HGI-304

allowedOperations: revoke one exact session or credential
forbiddenOperations: login, delete, or replace a profile
switch provider, account, environment, or target
emergencyContainment.durationRevocation: One operation for no more than 30 minutes; revoke emergency authority immediately after the postcondition or expiry
emergencyContainment.approvalBoundary: Authenticated incident principal plus a separate named approver, exact target/environment, one allowed operation, incident ID, last proved state, rollback owner, and inconclusive before receipt
emergencyContainment.receipt: Before/after incident receipt with actor, approver, target, operation, observedAt, last proved state, limitation, non-claim, rollback, expiry, and artifact digest
emergencyContainment.reconciliation: Obtain provider readback when available, retain the original inconclusive/failure evidence, revoke emergency access, and reconcile policy and target within 24 hours
emergencyContainment.stopCondition: Stop when target, identity, approver, operation, expiry, rollback, receipt, or escalation is unknown; unavailable readback never permits normal mutation
emergencyContainment.escalation: Bundjil security/automation maintainer and the exact provider owner
emergencyContainment.nonClaim: Emergency containment is not normal operation and does not establish provider health, incident resolution, ordinary mutation authority, recovery, or current Production state
